description: Define the structural properties of a wind turbine blade named 'StructBlade10' in QBlade. Use a NACA 0012 airfoil (100 panels) with an XFoil polar analysis (Re=1,000,000, NCrit=9, AoA -5 to 20). The blade must have three sections at 0m, 5m, and 10m, all using the NACA 0012 airfoil with a Chord of 1.0m and 0 Twist. Assign the following distributed structural properties: at 0m (Mass: 40 kg/m, Stiffness EI: 1.0e7), at 5m (Mass: 20 kg/m, Stiffness EI: 0.5e7), and at 10m (Mass: 5 kg/m, Stiffness EI: 0.1e7). Record the resulting Total Blade Mass in kg as a numeric value in /home/ga/Documents/blade_mass.txt and save the project file to /home/ga/Documents/projects/structural_design.wpa.
